text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide... And Taishin? What are you two doing here? Oh, were you
invited to the party too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We're not here for that...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We came to have our own party. I had no idea this was the same
location as yours... What incredible odds.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, your own party, just the two of you... Huh? Two? Um, aren't you...
missing someone?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you mean Ticket? She's in bed sleeping off a cold. Actually, this
party was her suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's... unfortunate. She must have been looking forward to it.
Aren't you going to miss her?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not really! I mean, she knows better than to let a cold stop her...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, she's right. It's just as Taishin says—we've nothing to be sad
about. You see, Ticket promised us.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She promised to speed along her recovery and rush right over.
Considering it's her, I really believe a miracle like that could happen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ah, okay... Yeah, with all the energy she's got, she'll probably blow
that cold right out of her system.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. So we'll proceed as scheduled for the time being and start
preparing until she arrives.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, isn't that enough about us? You were in a hurry stepping out.
You have something to do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's right, I need to find a present as fast as possible!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: A present? From you to the fans?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everyone went through the trouble of planning this party for
me, so I want to give them something in return.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But... then I started thinking about all the good food that'd be here,
and suddenly it was today already...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Is she for real?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Right! Hayahide, you knew exactly how I felt the other day. You're
really smart. Would you please lend me your wits for this?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Certainly. I'd be happy to assist. But first, tell me what kind of gift
you were thinking about giving.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well... I mean, it'd have to be something that'd make them all
happy... and glad... and excited... and overjoyed. A present like that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your sentiment is splendid, but I'm afraid it's a little lacking in details.
Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I know. Why don't you try drawing from past experience?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Past experience?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
For example, what's something you've received before that made you
happy? What filled you with joy?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Oh! I remember! There was something I got when I was little.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
One year there was a big tag tournament I joined. I remember I
wanted to ask Santa for a carrot if I won.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But all I could think about was playing tag... I completely forgot to
write a letter to Santa. But somehow...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I got first in the tournament, and when I went home I found it under
the tree... There was a card that said "Congrats on getting first!" on
top of a big basket of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I didn't write the letter though, so how'd Santa know? I wondered if
my mom told him, but I never told her or anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was really surprised. Santa's amazing, I thought... That was the
happiest I ever felt on a holiday.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So if I could become Santa... I'd know what would make everyone
happy? I just need to find some flying reindeer...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Erm, I don't think that's the lesson to be learned here. Though seeing
things from Santa's point of view is an excellent idea.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What could make everyone happy and is also something you're
capable of giving? I believe the answer already lies within you, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I've got it inside me? ...All right, I'll try thinking it out! Thanks!
You too, Taishin, for listening to my problem!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh! ...You sure she really gets it? That sudden burst of enthusiasm is
giving me déjà vu.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe. The two of them share the same earnestness.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And what about that story of hers? It was definitely her mom, wasn't
it? It doesn't take a genius to figure out Oguri would love to get
carrots.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you're correct. But it isn't our place to tell her that Santa was
her mother all along.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She should be able to find a present now. Or maybe I should've explained a little further...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Control freak. We did plenty—achoo! Geez... Come on, it's freezing.
Let's get inside already and prep our party.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right you are. Let's make things perfect by this evening and give
Ticket a nice surprise.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If anyone can make a miracle happen on a day like this, it's her. If she
doesn't pull through, there will be a great deal of food left over.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? You mean you took care of the food already? Ugh, I knew these boxes were way too heavy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You said I didn't need to bring anything, so I thought we were making
stuff here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'm counting on you to help with all the decorations and
setting up we need to do. And you'll be working double since Ticket's
not here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's really gotten cold out though. And the report said it'd be sunny all
day. Well, we'll just have to keep an eye on the weather.
